Bug.Title: Login button unresponsive on mobile
Bug.Description: The login button does not respond to tap on iOS Safari
Bug.StepsToReproduce: 1. Open app on iOS Safari 2. Enter credentials 3. Tap Login

Bug.Title: Dashboard loads slowly
Bug.Description: Dashboard takes over 10 seconds to load on first visit
Bug.StepsToReproduce: 1. Log in 2. Navigate to dashboard 3. Observe load time
